basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Website Coordinator, Research Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS), Centre for Urban Policy and Governance
basic_details.post_name: Website Coordinator & Research Assistant, Content Development Specialist
basic_details.short_information: TISS is recruiting dynamic professionals for two key roles to support research, website management, and content development in the area of gender-inclusive climate action and urban governance.

qualification.details: Website Coordinator & Research Assistant: Candidates with strong skills in website content management, research support, and academic writing. Content Specialist: Journalist with proven experience in content writing, editing, proofreading, and grammatical correction. Selected candidates will work closely with the Project Leader (Prof. Manjula Bharathy).

vacancy_details.Position: Content Development, Proofreading and Grammatical Correction Specialist

post_wise_breakdown.position: Content Development, Proofreading and Grammatical Correction Specialist

salary_details.details: Website Coordinator & Research Assistant: ₹20,000/- per month Content Development Specialist: ₹25,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting will be based on CV
and relevant experience. Shortlisted candidates may be called for interview/discussion. Final selection is at the discretion of the Project Leader and TISS.
how_to_apply: Prepare your CV and a brief Statement of Interest (max 500 words).
Use the prescribed application format (Full Name, Contact Details, Educational Qualifications, Work Experience, Statement of Interest, Preferred Position, Availability).
Send application by email to [email protected] with subject line: “Application for Project Staff – [Position Name]”.
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary and project-based. No claim for regular appointment at TISS. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: TISS Mumbai Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Website Coordinator & Research Assistant: Candidates with strong skills in website content management, research support, and academic writing. Content Specialist: Journalist with proven experience in content writing, editing, proofreading, and grammatical correction. Selected candidates will work closely with the Project Leader (Prof. Manjula Bharathy).

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 202 Remuneration
content_sections.text: Website Coordinator & Research Assistant: ₹20,000/- per month Content Development Specialist: ₹25,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: TISS Project Staff Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting will be based on CV, Statement of Interest, and relevant experience. Shortlisted candidates may be called for interview/discussion. Final selection is at the discretion of the Project Leader and TISS.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for TISS Project Staff Positions
content_sections.text: Prepare your CV and a brief Statement of Interest (max 500 words). Use the prescribed application format (Full Name, Contact Details, Educational Qualifications, Work Experience, Statement of Interest, Preferred Position, Availability). Send application by email to [email protected] with subject line: “Application for Project Staff – [Position Name]”. Deadline: 31st July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for TISS Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary and project-based. No claim for regular appointment at TISS. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Project Staff Positions 2026?
faq.answer: 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many positions are available in TISS Centre for Urban Policy and Governance recruitment?
faq.answer: Two positions – Website Coordinator & Research Assistant and Content Development Specialist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Content Development Specialist at TISS?
faq.answer: ₹25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the TISS Gender-Inclusive Climate Action Plan project positions?
faq.answer: 2 years starting from August 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Who should apply for the Website Coordinator position at TISS?
faq.answer: Candidates with skills in website management, research assistance, and academic support.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility for Content Development Specialist at TISS Mumbai?
faq.answer: Journalist with prior work experience in content writing and editing.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for TISS Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send CV and Statement of Interest to [email protected] with the correct subject line.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project name under which TISS is recruiting project staff?
faq.answer: Gender-Inclusive Community Driven Climate Action Plan.

faq.question: Q9. Is the TISS project staff position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is temporary for the duration of the project (2 years).

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Project Lead for TISS Urban Policy and Governance recruitment?
faq.answer: Prof. Manjula Bharathy.
